question: I have never ordered delivery after 3 AM.
I have never snoozed my alarm more than ten times.
I have never fallen asleep mid-meal.
I have never woken up right before I had to leave for work or school.
I have never opened the fridge, stared into it, and closed it without taking anything.
I have never eaten something past its expiration date.
I have never gone grocery shopping and spent more than twice my budget.
I have never let laundry sit for more than a week.
I have never skipped showering for two days or more.
I have never left a message unread for more than a day.
I have never eaten a late-night snack and gone straight to bed.
I have never pulled an all-nighter watching a single video.
I have never let dishes pile up for more than a day.
I have never been too lazy to tie my shoes and worn them anyway.
I have never stopped vacuuming halfway because it got annoying.
I have never finished a meal with no memory of what I ate.
I have never survived on under 1% battery for an extended stretch.
I have never spontaneously spent more than fifty dollars at a convenience store.
I have never let my nails grow way too long before cutting them.
I have never spilled sauce on my clothes while eating.
I have never spent more than thirty minutes searching for something I forgot where I put.
I have never swiped my card without knowing how much was left in my account.
I have never been too lazy to cook and just skipped a meal.
I have never had more than three coffees in a single day.
I have never given someone on the street directions.
I have never been confused about when my package was supposed to arrive and just waited.
I have never gone to buy one thing and come back with something completely different.
I have never walked around with one earphone in for a weirdly long time.
I have never fallen asleep on public transit and missed my stop.
I have never let a delivery meal go completely cold before eating it.
I have never left home without my phone.
I have never fallen into a YouTube rabbit hole for two-plus hours.
I have never gotten the date of a plan wrong and shown up for nothing.
I have never left a package sitting unopened for days.
I have never left home without my wallet and been caught out.
I have never rewatched the same video more than three times.
I have never taken a free sample at a store more than twice.
I have never stayed home all day without stepping outside once.
I have never laid down to sleep and then spent another two hours on my phone.
I have never canceled a food delivery and then reordered it.
I have never done a bungee jump.
I have never bought a plane ticket on impulse.
I have never traveled abroad alone.
I have never gone skydiving or paragliding.
I have never taken a trip with no plan at all.
I have never pitched a tent and slept outdoors.
I have never snowboarded or skied.
I have never tried surfing.
I have never spent a night somewhere completely remote or off-the-grid.
I have never lived in another country for more than a month.
I have never climbed to a high place despite having a fear of heights.
I have never gotten genuinely lost in an unfamiliar neighborhood.
I have never ridden a motorcycle or cycled long distance.
I have never properly learned how to swim.
I have never stayed out at a club until dawn.
I have never checked off a single item on my bucket list.
I have never ridden in a hot air balloon or a small plane.
I have never gotten up at 4 AM to go watch the sunrise.
I have never gone to an exhibition or a show alone.
I have never gone on a spontaneous road trip with friends.
I have never started a conversation with a stranger and become friends.
I have never done volunteer work.
I have never just ordered something unfamiliar and judged it after eating.
I have never hiked alone.
I have never stayed up all night at a beach or river.
I have never competed in something and come in first place.
I have never gone backpacking with just the bare essentials.
I have never spent a full day alone in an unfamiliar city.
I have never stayed up all night gaming or binging a series.
I have never performed on a stage in front of people.
I have never learned something from a completely new field.
I have never taken a solo train trip.
I have never impulsively driven or headed out to a river or the ocean in the middle of the night.
I have never fully clicked with a group of strangers at a party.
I have never seriously started learning a new language.
I have never deliberately gone somewhere just to see an impressive sunset or city lights.
I have never gone out of my way to find and eat at an unknown restaurant.
I have never moved out and lived on my own.
I have never done a haunted house or extreme scare attraction.
I have never endured extreme cold or heat outdoors for an extended stretch.
I have never walked out of a blind date.
I have never blocked someone's number.
I have never had someone confess their feelings to me.
I have never been the first one to confess.
I have never held back from texting an ex after a breakup.
I have never had a friendship just suddenly fade out.
I have never had a one-sided crush for more than a year.
I have never been in a public relationship.
I have never had a relationship drift apart because of accumulated misunderstandings.
I have never cried hard over a friend.
I have never had a really big fight with a partner.
I have never told a friend directly that they hurt my feelings.
I have never given hollow or insincere comfort to someone.
I have never been the first one to end a relationship.
I have never cried over a partner.
I have never forced myself to maintain a relationship I didn't want to be in.
I have never been nice to someone I genuinely disliked just to keep the peace.
I have never gotten close to someone extremely quickly the first time I met them.
I have never lent money to a friend.
I have never left a group chat.
I have never gotten back together with an ex.
I have never reconnected with someone I lost touch with for a long time.
I have never had a serious argument with a family member.
I have never planned a surprise for a partner.
I have never stayed completely quiet in a group gathering.
I have never carried a misunderstanding about someone for a long time.
I have never felt awkward around my partner's friends.
I have never given up on someone I wanted to be with.
I have never been surprised by a memory that was different from an old friend's.
I have never been the first one to cut off contact.
I have never fumbled my words in front of someone I liked.
I have never shared a friend's secret with someone else.
I have never genuinely thanked someone and told them so.
I have never found it hard to be the first one to say sorry.
I have never felt relieved after a relationship ended.
I have never been let down by someone I had high hopes for.
I have never walked up to a kid I didn't know and started talking to them.
I have never given up something important for someone I love.
I have never lost someone's contact and been unable to reach them again.
I have never written a heartfelt letter.
I have never quietly spent a long time going through someone's social media.
I have never made up an excuse to cancel plans.
I have never seen a message and pretended I hadn't.
I have never cried alone without anyone knowing.
I have never been disappointed in myself and stayed unmotivated for a while.
I have never said I was sick when I wasn't.
I have never received a gift and privately thought it was bad.
I have never wanted to leave a gathering because I was tired but stayed anyway to avoid awkwardness.
I have never said food was delicious when it wasn't.
I have never quietly stewed in jealousy over someone.
I have never received a compliment and internally felt weird about it.
I have never pretended to have read a book I hadn't.
I have never pretended to be interested in a conversation I didn't care about at all.
I have never acted like I was hearing something for the first time when I already knew it.
I have never pretended I was fine when I wasn't.
I have never known something was wrong and looked the other way.
I have never held it together in front of everyone and then cried on the way home.
I have never been genuinely envious watching someone else succeed.
I have never lied to cover up a mistake.
I have never exaggerated something to get recognition.
I have never made weird faces at myself in the mirror when I was alone.
I have never said 'let's hang out soon' with no real intention of following through.
I have never just agreed with someone even though they were wrong.
I have never deliberately taken a long time to reply to a message to seem less available.
I have never pretended I had money when I didn't.
I have never overheard a conversation that wasn't meant for me.
I have never blamed bad luck when something went wrong because of me.
I have never genuinely wanted to go to karaoke alone.
I have never stared at my phone waiting for a specific person to text.
I have never regretted not saying how I actually felt.
I have never taken a photo and quietly deleted it because I didn't like how I looked.
I have never tried to appear confident in front of people when I wasn't.
I have never received a compliment and deep down not believed it.
I have never been cold to someone I actually liked.
I have never smiled in front of others while struggling on the inside.
I have never had a dark thought and then been startled by my own mind.
I have never had something I wanted to say to someone but never got the chance.
I have never done something I didn't want to do while acting perfectly fine on the outside.
I have never rationalized something I knew was wrong.
I have never felt reluctant to say my real age.
